---
title-block: false
description: "Personal website of Lewis Kwon."
---

::: {.hero .compact}
::: {.hero-copy}
# Lewis Kwon

**Senior Deputy Director, Division of Infectious Disease Control**  
Korea Disease Control and Prevention Agency (KDCA)  
Sejong, Republic of Korea

I currently lead the Viral Hepatitis Prevention and Control team in support of the WHO's 2030 elimination targets, drawing on hands-on experience in evidence-based vaccination strategy and public health response. My work centers on strengthening global health security through partnership and sound, evidence-informed policy—particularly in vaccine programs and infectious disease prevention. I also lecture regularly on infectious disease response, vaccine policy, and public health decision-making, and welcome inquiries from colleagues and institutions interested in these areas.

::: {.button-row}
[CV](files/cv-lewis-kwon-public.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
[Publications](publications.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
[Contact](contact.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
[한국어](ko/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::
:::

::: {.hero-image}
![](images/profile.png){fig-alt="Profile photo of Lewis Kwon"}
:::
:::
